creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text: I cannot answer that. I don't maintain that portion of the ports tree. Your problem has nothing to do with cups-filters itself, something is wrong on your system specifically. The only reason cups-filters complains is because it looks for libqpdf, it isn't looking for libjpeg but checking libqpdf and notices the missing library. If this was a more widespread problem, more people would be complaining about it, and that isn't the case. There is nothing more I can do for this.
